name: property managers handling 10-20 rental properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 rental properties/month, inaccurate reports cause cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate and delayed rent reconciliation reports
features: manual entry for initial data input
